title: spergularia microsperma subsp. microsperma
intro: Spergularia microsperma subsp. microsperma is a subspecies of the annual flowering plant Spergularia microsperma, commonly known as the lesser sandspurry. It is a low-growing, spreading plant with yellowish-green leaves and white or pink flowers. The plant is known to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Spergularia microsperma subsp. microsperma include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, and it can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves.
